positive_cases.name: all_mvp_triggers_present
positive_cases.prompt: Validate the cluster when all MVP skills have trigger-map entries and existing skill directories are structurally valid.

positive_cases.name: known_good_skill
positive_cases.prompt: Run cluster linter against a known-good skill with SKILL.md, frontmatter, eval signal, validation signal, and trigger entry.
expected: warnings allowed only for optional resources

negative_cases.name: missing_skill_md
negative_cases.prompt: Validate a skill directory without SKILL.md.

negative_cases.name: placeholder_in_skill
negative_cases.prompt: Validate a skill with missing frontmatter and unresolved placeholder text.

negative_cases.name: missing_trigger_entry
negative_cases.prompt: Validate MVP scope when a required MVP skill is absent from trigger-map.yaml.

end_to_end_cases.name: mlllm_style_full_architecture
end_to_end_cases.prompt: Build an SEO and LLM-friendly architecture for an AI news site with one short brief, one longform article, EN/RU localization, topic pages, projects, author page, schema, llms.txt, RSS, sitemap, and validation.

end_to_end_cases.name: saas_site_growth_plan
end_to_end_cases.prompt: Plan SEO, LLM-readable docs, product pages, comparisons, schema, internal links, and validation for a B2B SaaS site without Search Console access.

end_to_end_cases.name: portfolio_project_entity_graph
end_to_end_cases.prompt: Make a personal engineering portfolio discoverable to search engines and AI agents with project pages, author profile, blog, topics, schema, and validation.
